sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available for SNES port

special_mechanics.name: Shield Block
special_mechanics.description: Fighter, Cleric, and Dwarf can block certain attacks by tilting joystick backward before impact

special_mechanics.name: Magical Attack (Screen-Wide)
special_mechanics.description: All characters can unleash a magical attack striking all enemies on screen at energy cost; strength varies by character

special_mechanics.name: Level-Based Attribute Scaling
special_mechanics.description: Character health increases with each level gained through experience; range and other attributes improve progressively

special_mechanics.name: Invulnerability on Level-Up
special_mechanics.description: Character becomes invulnerable for a few seconds upon gaining a new level

character_notes: Five playable characters with distinct traits: Fighter (melee/defense-focused), Dwarf (agile/evasive/short-range), Elf (agile/ranged/weak melee), Cleric (defensive/healing/low agility), Wizard (poor defense/strong magic/fast melee)
tier_notes: Tier 2 - Empirical/Qualitative. No precise movement parameters, gravity values, or sub-pixel system data documented in available sources. Game is a port of 1991 arcade title with SNES technical downgrades including reduced simultaneous players (3→2) and smaller character sprites. Sources contain gameplay mechanics and level/character progression systems but lack low-level physics documentation.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - The King of Dragons (SNES)
